divisions.title: Gospel Defense
divisions.theme: The true gospel and Paul's authority
divisions.summary: Paul defends the gospel of grace against false teachers, recounts his calling and confrontation with Peter

divisions.title: Freedom in Christ
divisions.summary: Justification by faith not works of law, Abraham's children through faith, heirs in Christ not slaves

divisions.title: Life in the Spirit
divisions.summary: Freedom not license, flesh versus Spirit, fruit of the Spirit, doing good and bearing burdens

chapterSummaries.1: Paul's apostleship, no other gospel, his calling from God
chapterSummaries.2: Gospel confirmed by apostles, confrontation with Peter, justified by faith
chapterSummaries.3: Received the Spirit by faith, the law was a guardian, one in Christ
chapterSummaries.4: No longer slaves but sons, Paul's concern, allegory of Hagar and Sarah
chapterSummaries.5: Stand firm in freedom, walk by the Spirit, fruit of the Spirit
chapterSummaries.6: Bear one another's burdens, sow to the Spirit, boast in the cross
